name: Ethiopian Beef and Peppers
recipeIngredient: 6 each Green chiles, skinned, seeded, chopped
2 teaspoons Fresh ginger, peeled and chopped
2 pounds Sirloin steak, cut into half-inch strips
2 each Bell peppers, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the chiles, ginger, garlic, spices, and wine to a smooth paste.
2. Brown the beef in hot oil.
3. When evenly browned, remove the beef and drain off all but 2 tablespoons of oil.
4. Saute the onion in the remaining oil until soft but not browned.
5. Add the bell peppers and saute for an additional 3 minutes.
6. Add the chile puree and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
7. Add the beef and mix until the strips are coated with sauce.
8. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 more minutes until the beef is cooked through.
